name: Run 3
author: Poki
description: Run 3 Run 3 is a space running game where you guide a small alien through floating tunnels filled with gaps and collapsing tiles while gravity flips as you run. Miss a jump and you drift into space. Run onto a wall and gravity rotates, turning that wall into your new floor so you keep running on a different side of the tunnel. In Run 3, some tiles crumble, while ice tiles force earlier jumps. If you jump the same way every time, you will fall. Play Run 3 for free at Poki and see how far you can go before the tunnels make you miss a jump. How Run 3 works You run automatically. Because you cannot stop moving, every landing must prepare the next jump. Line yourself up and time your jumps so that every landing gets you ready for the next platform. Run 3 is about looking ahead before you land. Move left or right to prepare your next landing, not just to avoid falling. Jump to clear gaps, but focus on where you will land next. Run onto walls to rotate gravity and continue along a new surface. Collapsing tiles remove safe ground quickly, so waiting too long usually causes you to fall. Ice requires earlier jumps because of increased speed, while conveyors demand delayed timing based on which way they move. Controls Desktop: Move sideways: Left / Right arrows Jump: Up arrow / Space Mobile: Use the on-screen controls to move and jump. Holding jump increases distance . Short taps help control smaller adjustments when precision matters more than speed. Run 3 game modes Run 3 includes 2 game modes that change how you play. Explore Mode: Move through hundreds of connected levels and revisit paths to practise difficult sections. This mode lets you see how surfaces change your jumps on each level. Infinite Mode: Endless runs focused on survival and collecting Power Cells. Playing repeatedly lets you react faster to new tunnel layouts, making this the best mode for improving consistency. Optional challenges reward Power Cells for completing levels in unusual ways, letting you replay
